name: LanMountain Sample Plugin
description: Official sample plugin used to validate PluginSdk v5 loading, appearance, settings, and market installation.
author: LanMountainDesktop
releaseNotes: Reference plugin for SDK v5 validation. The desktop app prefers the tagged GitHub Release asset and publishes a market-manifest.json contract with releaseAsset, rawFallback, and workspaceLocal package sources.
